units.content: source tag takes a third predetermined value distinct from the first two values
third value indicates record was produced by an automated actor
automated actor performs an action on the target entity
producing each action record comprises recording in the same six-field schema
schema is the same as records whose source tag carries first or second values
one or more structured pointers identifying coupling entries whose content was read by the automated actor
automated actor read coupling entries prior to producing the action
action was conditioned upon the coupling entries that were read
